title: <div>   - Canva: For creating visually appealing social media graphics, flyers,
content:
- Canva: For creating visually appealing social media graphics, flyers, and other marketing materials.

6. Content Creation and Management

- Adobe Creative Cloud: Offers a suite of software for graphic design (Photoshop), video editing (Premiere Pro), and web design (XD) for creating high-quality marketing materials.
- Grammarly or Hemingway: To ensure all written content is clear, error-free, and engaging.
- https://seo.ai/
- https://byword.ai/
- https://www.scalenut.com/solutions/seo-content-strategist

7. Virtual Tours and Photography

- Matterport: For creating 3D virtual tours of properties, which is particularly appealing for high-end waterfront properties.
- Adobe Lightroom and Photoshop: For editing and enhancing property photos.

8. Project Management and Collaboration

- Trello or Asana: For project management and team collaboration.
- Slack: For internal communication and coordination among team members.
